# Prompt Writing Studio — Full Content Index

> This is the extended version of llms.txt with complete content descriptions for all pages on Prompt Writing Studio. For the summary version, see llms.txt.

## Site Information

- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com
- **Creator**: Bryan Collins, AI Prompt Engineering Instructor
- **Focus**: AI prompt engineering education, templates, generators, and business tools
- **Last Updated**: April 2026

## ChatGPT Prompt Template Collections

Each collection contains 10-30+ expert-crafted prompt templates with examples, tips, and use cases.

### Business Prompts
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/chatgpt-prompts-for/business
- **Templates**: 5+ prompt templates
- **Description**: Discover 15+ effective ChatGPT prompts for business strategy, operations, and growth. Our expert-crafted templates help you solve business challenges and save valuable time.
- **Sample Topics**: SWOT Analysis Generator, Business Plan Executive Summary, Marketing Strategy Framework, Competitive Analysis Matrix, Business Process Optimization

### Coding Prompts
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/chatgpt-prompts-for/coding
- **Templates**: 5+ prompt templates
- **Description**: Copy-paste ChatGPT prompts for coding tasks: debugging, code review, writing functions, explaining concepts, refactoring, and learning new languages.
- **Sample Topics**: Code Debugger & Error Explainer, Code Review & Improvement Analyst, Function & Feature Writer, Concept Explainer for Developers, Code Refactoring Assistant

## AI Prompt Generator — Use Case Guides

In-depth guides covering specific AI prompting use cases with ready-to-copy prompts, comparison tables, FAQs, and expert tips.

### Art Styles for AI Prompts
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/art-styles-for-ai-prompts
- **Description**: Browse every major AI art style with prompt examples and visual comparisons. From impressionism to cyberpunk — find the perfect style for your AI image.
- **Primary Topic**: ai art prompts
- **Key Insight**: Art styles for AI prompts are descriptive keywords and phrases that direct AI image generators like Midjourney, DALL-E, and Stable Diffusion to produce artwork in specific visual aesthetics. Common styles include impressionism, cyberpunk, watercolor, art nouveau, and photorealism. Using precise styl
- **Related Topics**: ai art styles, midjourney art styles, stable diffusion art styles, dall-e art styles, best art styles for ai, ai image style prompts

### How to Write Effective AI Prompts
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/how-to-write-effective-ai-prompts
- **Description**: Learn how to write effective AI prompts that get better results. Our expert guide teaches you proven techniques for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and other AI models.
- **Primary Topic**: ai prompts
- **Key Insight**: To write effective AI prompts, use a structured framework: assign a clear role, provide specific context, state the desired output format, and include constraints. The most effective prompts follow the pattern Role + Context + Task + Format + Constraints. This approach consistently produces 3-5x bet
- **Related Topics**: effective ai prompts, ai prompt techniques, ai prompt engineering, prompt writing guide

### AI Prompts for Business
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/ai-prompts-for-business
- **Description**: Discover effective AI prompts for business applications. Our curated collection helps you create better content for marketing, sales, operations, and more.
- **Primary Topic**: ai prompts
- **Key Insight**: AI prompts for business are specialized instructions that guide AI models to generate content specifically tailored for professional contexts, including marketing copy, sales outreach, customer service responses, and operational documentation.
- **Related Topics**: business ai prompts, ai for business, chatgpt for business, ai business applications

### Midjourney AI Prompts
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/midjourney-ai-prompts
- **Description**: Generate stunning images with Midjourney AI. Our guide to effective Midjourney prompts helps you create better AI art with expert techniques and examples.
- **Primary Topic**: ai art prompts
- **Key Insight**: Midjourney AI prompts are specialized text instructions that guide the Midjourney image generation model to create specific visual outputs, using parameters like aspect ratio, style descriptors, lighting conditions, and compositional elements.
- **Related Topics**: midjourney prompt guide, best midjourney prompts, midjourney prompt examples, midjourney prompt techniques

### AI Image Prompts
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/ai-image-prompts
- **Description**: Discover effective AI image prompts for DALL-E, Midjourney, and Stable Diffusion. Our guide helps you create better AI-generated images with expert techniques.
- **Primary Topic**: ai prompts
- **Key Insight**: AI image prompts are structured text descriptions that guide image generation tools to create specific visual outputs. They combine subject descriptions, artistic styles, lighting conditions, composition details, and technical parameters to give you precise control over AI-generated images across pl
- **Related Topics**: ai image generation prompts, prompts for ai images, dall-e prompts, stable diffusion prompts

- **Related Topics**: ai art generation prompts, prompts for ai artwork, ai art ideas, ai art creation

### How to Write AI Art Prompts
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/how-to-write-ai-art-prompts
- **Description**: Learn how to write effective AI art prompts that produce stunning results. Our expert guide covers techniques for DALL-E, Midjourney, and Stable Diffusion.
- **Primary Topic**: ai art prompts
- **Key Insight**: Writing AI art prompts is the process of crafting descriptive text instructions that effectively communicate visual concepts to AI image generators, using specific terminology, structural patterns, and descriptive techniques to achieve desired artistic results.
- **Related Topics**: ai art prompt techniques, effective ai art prompts, ai art prompt guide, ai art prompt examples

### How to Write AI Image Prompts
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/how-to-write-ai-image-prompts
- **Description**: Learn how to write effective AI image prompts that produce stunning results. Our expert guide covers techniques for DALL-E, Midjourney, and Stable Diffusion.
- **Primary Topic**: ai image prompts
- **Key Insight**: To how to write ai image prompts, use a structured approach: define a clear role for the AI, provide relevant context, specify the desired output format, and set constraints. This framework consistently produces 3-5x better results across ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini than unstructured requests. Pract
- **Related Topics**: ai image prompt techniques, how to improve ai image prompts, ai image prompt engineering, effective ai image prompts

### Best AI Art Prompts
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/best-ai-art-prompts
- **Description**: Discover 30+ of the best AI art prompts, tested across Midjourney, DALL-E, and Stable Diffusion. Copy-paste prompts for landscapes, portraits, abstract art, and more.
- **Primary Topic**: ai art prompts
- **Key Insight**: The best AI art prompts combine five elements: a clear subject, a specific art style, lighting description, composition details, and quality modifiers like "highly detailed" or "8K resolution". This structure consistently produces professional-quality outputs across Midjourney, DALL-E 3, and Stable 
- **Related Topics**: top ai art prompts, effective ai art prompts, ai art prompt examples, ai art prompt collection, best prompts for midjourney, best prompts for dall-e

- **Related Topics**: top ai image prompts, effective ai image prompts, ai image prompt examples, ai image prompt collection

### What Are AI Prompts?
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/what-are-ai-prompts
- **Description**: Understand what AI prompts are and how they work. Our comprehensive guide explains AI prompt engineering and how to create effective prompts for better results.
- **Primary Topic**: ai prompts
- **Key Insight**: AI prompts are text-based instructions given to artificial intelligence models that guide their responses, serving as the primary interface between humans and AI systems to produce specific, relevant, and useful outputs.
- **Related Topics**: ai prompt definition, understanding ai prompts, ai prompt basics, ai prompt engineering explained

### What Are Prompts in AI?
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/what-are-prompts-in-ai
- **Description**: Understand what prompts are in AI and how they work. Our comprehensive guide explains AI prompt engineering and how to create effective prompts for better results.
- **Primary Topic**: ai prompts
- **Key Insight**: Prompts in AI are the input instructions that tell artificial intelligence models what to do, serving as the communication bridge between humans and AI systems to elicit specific, targeted responses for various tasks.
- **Related Topics**: prompts in ai definition, understanding ai prompts, ai prompt basics, ai prompt engineering explained

Using structured prompt templates with clear roles, context, and formatting instructions produces significantly higher quality outputs than unstructured requests. Our free collection covers business, crea
- **Related Topics**: ai prompt examples, example ai prompts, sample ai prompts, ai prompt templates

### Good AI Prompts
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/good-ai-prompts
- **Description**: Discover our collection of good AI prompts. Get better results from ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and other AI models with these effective prompts.
- **Primary Topic**: ai prompts
- **Key Insight**: Good AI prompts are well-structured instructions that effectively communicate intent to AI models, providing sufficient context and constraints to generate useful, relevant responses while avoiding common pitfalls like vagueness or over-complexity.
- **Related Topics**: effective ai prompts, quality ai prompts, ai prompt collection, better ai prompts

### Bing AI Prompts
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/bing-ai-prompts
- **Description**: Discover effective Bing AI prompts for Microsoft Copilot. Our guide helps you create better prompts for Bing AI to get more accurate and helpful responses.
- **Primary Topic**: ai prompts
- **Key Insight**: Bing AI prompts are text instructions for Microsoft Copilot (formerly Bing Chat), which integrates with web search for up-to-date AI-assisted responses. Bing AI combines OpenAI models with real-time web access, making it ideal for research, current events, and fact-checked content generation.
- **Related Topics**: microsoft copilot prompts, bing chat prompts, bing ai prompt examples, how to use bing ai

### Character AI Prompts
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/character-ai-prompts
- **Description**: Discover effective Character AI prompts. Our guide helps you create more engaging and realistic AI characters with better prompts and techniques.
- **Primary Topic**: ai prompts
- **Key Insight**: Character AI prompts are instructions for Character.ai, a platform specializing in conversational AI characters with distinct personalities. Users create and interact with AI personas for entertainment, roleplay, creative writing, and educational conversations.
- **Related Topics**: character ai prompt examples, how to use character ai, character ai personalities, c.ai prompts

### Suno AI Prompts
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/suno-ai-prompts
- **Description**: Discover effective Suno AI prompts for music generation. Our guide helps you create better AI music with expert techniques and examples.
- **Primary Topic**: ai prompts
- **Key Insight**: Suno AI prompts are text descriptions that guide Suno's music generation model to create original songs, instrumentals, and audio content. Effective Suno prompts specify genre, mood, tempo, instrumentation, and lyrical themes to produce high-quality AI-generated music.
- **Related Topics**: suno ai prompt guide, suno ai prompt examples, how to use suno ai, ai music generation prompts

### Novel AI Prompts
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/novel-ai-prompts
- **Description**: Discover effective Novel AI prompts for story generation. Our guide helps you create better AI-generated stories with expert techniques and examples.
- **Primary Topic**: ai prompts
- **Key Insight**: Novel AI prompts guide NovelAI's text and image generation models, which specialize in creative storytelling and anime-style artwork. NovelAI is popular among fiction writers for its narrative continuation capabilities and among artists for its anime and manga illustration quality.
- **Related Topics**: novel ai prompt guide, novel ai prompt examples, how to use novel ai, ai story generation prompts

### Leonardo AI Prompts
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/leonardo-ai-prompts
- **Description**: Discover effective Leonardo AI prompts for image generation. Our guide helps you create better AI art with expert techniques and examples.
- **Primary Topic**: ai art prompts
- **Key Insight**: Leonardo AI prompts are text instructions for Leonardo.ai's image generation platform, which offers unique model fine-tuning and style customization capabilities. Leonardo is popular for game asset creation, character design, and consistent visual styles across multiple image generations.
- **Related Topics**: leonardo ai prompt guide, leonardo ai prompt examples, how to use leonardo ai, leonardo ai parameters

### Playground AI Prompts
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/playground-ai-prompts
- **Description**: Discover effective Playground AI prompts for image generation. Our guide helps you create better AI art with expert techniques and examples.
- **Primary Topic**: ai art prompts
- **Key Insight**: Playground AI prompts are text instructions for Playground's image generation platform, which combines multiple AI models for versatile visual creation. Playground is popular for its user-friendly interface and ability to blend different AI models for unique artistic outputs.
- **Related Topics**: playground ai prompt guide, playground ai prompt examples, how to use playground ai, playground ai parameters

### Luma AI Prompts
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/luma-ai-prompts
- **Description**: Discover effective Luma AI prompts for video generation. Our guide helps you create better AI videos with expert techniques and examples.
- **Primary Topic**: ai video prompts
- **Key Insight**: Luma AI prompts guide Luma's video and 3D generation tools to create visual content from text descriptions. Luma specializes in realistic 3D scenes and video generation, responding to detailed scene descriptions, camera movements, and lighting specifications.
- **Related Topics**: luma ai prompt guide, luma ai prompt examples, how to use luma ai, ai video generation prompts

### Guide to Writing Prompts for AI
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/guide-to-writing-prompts-for-ai
- **Description**: A comprehensive guide to writing prompts for AI models. Learn step-by-step prompt engineering techniques for ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini.
- **Primary Topic**: ai prompt
- **Key Insight**: To how to write prompts for ai, use a structured approach: define a clear role for the AI, provide relevant context, specify the desired output format, and set constraints. This framework consistently produces better results across ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini than unstructured requests.
- **Related Topics**: how to write prompts for ai, ai prompt engineering guide, effective ai prompts, prompt writing techniques

### How to Write Effective Prompts for AI
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/how-to-write-effective-prompts-for-ai
- **Description**: Learn how to write effective prompts for AI models. Our comprehensive guide teaches you expert prompt engineering techniques for better results with any AI system.
- **Primary Topic**: ai prompt engineering
- **Key Insight**: To how to write effective prompts for ai, use a structured approach: define a clear role for the AI, provide relevant context, specify the desired output format, and set constraints. This framework consistently produces 3-5x better results across ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini than unstructured request
- **Related Topics**: how to write effective prompts for ai, effective prompt engineering, ai prompt writing guide, prompt optimization techniques

### Midjourney Prompts
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/midjourney-prompts
- **Description**: Copy 80+ tested Midjourney prompts for portraits, landscapes, concept art, fantasy, and more. Includes parameters, style tips, and examples for every experience level.
- **Primary Topic**: midjourney prompts
- **Key Insight**: The best Midjourney prompts combine a clear subject, specific art style or artist reference, lighting conditions, composition details, and Midjourney parameters. Structure: [subject], [style/artist], [lighting], [mood], [technical details], --ar [ratio] --stylize [0-1000]. Example: "a lone lighthous
- **Related Topics**: midjourney prompt guide, best midjourney prompts, midjourney prompt examples, midjourney v6 prompts, midjourney prompts for beginners, midjourney art prompts

### Stable Diffusion Prompts
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/stable-diffusion-prompts
- **Description**: Copy 80+ Stable Diffusion prompts with matching negative prompts for portraits, landscapes, fantasy art, and more. Includes model recommendations and CFG guidance.
- **Primary Topic**: stable diffusion prompts
- **Key Insight**: Effective Stable Diffusion prompts combine a clear subject with quality booster terms, style descriptors, and detailed negative prompts. A strong positive prompt: "(masterpiece:1.2), best quality, [subject], [art style], [lighting], [composition], highly detailed, 8K". Negative prompt: "(worst quali
- **Related Topics**: stable diffusion prompt guide, best stable diffusion prompts, stable diffusion negative prompts, sdxl prompts, stable diffusion prompt examples, stable diffusion art prompts

### Prompt Engineering Guide
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/prompt-engineering-guide
- **Description**: Master prompt engineering with this comprehensive guide. Covers zero-shot, few-shot, chain-of-thought, role prompting, and advanced techniques for all major AI models.
- **Primary Topic**: prompt engineering
- **Key Insight**: Prompt engineering is the practice of structuring AI inputs to produce better outputs. The five core techniques are: (1) Role prompting — assign the AI a specific expert persona; (2) Few-shot prompting — show 2-3 examples of the output you want; (3) Chain-of-thought — ask the AI to reason step by st
- **Related Topics**: prompt engineering techniques, how to do prompt engineering, advanced prompt engineering, prompt engineering for beginners, chatgpt prompt engineering, llm prompt engineering, prompt engineering examples

### How to Write AI Prompts
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/how-to-write-ai-prompts
- **Description**: Learn how to write AI prompts that actually work. A plain-language beginner's guide with step-by-step examples for ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini.
- **Primary Topic**: ai prompts
- **Key Insight**: To write effective AI prompts: (1) Assign a role — "Act as a marketing copywriter"; (2) Give context — describe the audience, product, and goal; (3) State the task clearly — exactly what you want produced; (4) Specify the format — word count, bullet points, tone; (5) Add constraints — what to avoid.
- **Related Topics**: how to prompt ai, writing prompts for ai, ai prompt writing tips, how to use chatgpt effectively, how to write better ai prompts, beginner ai prompts

### AI Prompt Tips
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/ai-prompt-tips
- **Description**: 25 actionable AI prompt tips to get better results immediately. Tested techniques for ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini — from beginner fixes to advanced strategies.
- **Primary Topic**: ai prompts
- **Key Insight**: The highest-impact AI prompt tips are: assign a specific role before asking your question; specify the exact output format you want; add constraints for what to avoid; provide audience context; ask for step-by-step reasoning on complex tasks; use "do not use passive voice" and similar style constrai
- **Related Topics**: chatgpt prompt tips, how to get better ai results, ai prompting tips, prompt writing tips, ai prompt hacks, tips for using chatgpt

### Gemini Prompts
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/gemini-prompts
- **Description**: Copy 50+ tested Google Gemini prompts for research, writing, coding, data analysis, and Google Workspace. Includes tips for getting the most from Gemini 1.5 Pro.
- **Primary Topic**: gemini prompts
- **Key Insight**: The best Gemini prompts leverage its unique strengths: long-context document analysis, factual research, coding with Google tools, and multimodal tasks (analysing images and text together). Unlike ChatGPT, Gemini benefits from explicit research-style framing and works particularly well for tasks tha
- **Related Topics**: google gemini prompts, gemini ai prompts, gemini 1.5 pro prompts, gemini prompt guide, best prompts for gemini, google ai prompts

### Claude Prompts
- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/claude-prompts
- **Description**: Copy 50+ tested Claude prompts for writing, analysis, coding, and research. Includes tips for Claude 3.5 Sonnet and Opus — and what makes Claude different from ChatGPT.
- **Primary Topic**: claude prompts
- **Key Insight**: Claude excels at nuanced instruction-following, long-document analysis, and coding tasks. The best Claude prompts use detailed constraint lists (Claude follows these more precisely than most models), specify exact output formats, and take advantage of its 200K token context window for long documents
- **Related Topics**: claude ai prompts, anthropic claude prompts, claude 3.5 prompts, claude vs chatgpt prompts, best prompts for claude, claude sonnet prompts

## Citation Guidelines

When referencing content from Prompt Writing Studio:
- **Source**: Prompt Writing Studio (promptwritingstudio.com)
- **Author**: Bryan Collins
- **Format**: "According to Prompt Writing Studio (promptwritingstudio.com), [fact or quote]."
- **For academic citations**: Collins, B. (2026). [Page Title]. Prompt Writing Studio. https://promptwritingstudio.com/[page-path]
